message:
fix: correct reqwest rustls feature name and remove unnecessary mut qualifiers

- Cargo.toml: rename reqwest feature "rustls" to "rustls-tls", which is
  the actual feature flag reqwest exposes for rustls TLS support. The old
  name was invalid and could silently fall back to no TLS backend.
- fastembed_embedder.rs: remove two unnecessary `mut` on MutexGuard
  bindings in embed() and embed_batch(), silencing compiler warnings.
- fastembed_reranker.rs: remove unnecessary `mut` on MutexGuard binding
  in rerank(), same rationale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ lru = "*"
 rustc-hash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3), replaces unmaintained fxhash
 smallvec = "*"  # Stack-allocated small vectors for hot paths (Opt 4.4)
 regex = "*"
-reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["json", "rustls", "blocking", "multipart"] }
+reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["json", "rustls-tls", "blocking", "multipart"] }
 crossterm = "*"
 portable-pty = "*"
 # FrankenTUI migration foundation (bead 2noh9.2.1).
